title: Code needed for Seat-based Pricing for App
excerpt:
Hi there, 
I need help figuring out how to monetize my app.  I have been asked to perform a seat-based pricing plan after a 14 day trial.  What code needs to be written to implement this?

posts.author: JoshuaDenariSoft (Joshua Kaufman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I need help figuring out how to monetize my app. I have been asked to perform a seat-based pricing plan after a 14 day trial. What code needs to be written to implement this?

posts.author: Billchenau (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @JoshuaDenariSoft

Bill here from monday.com

For seat based pricing, our system will automatically detect the user’s accounts size and suggest a plan accordingly. You’ll only need to add additional code if you’re looking to add your own blocking or feature selection mechanisms.

You can find out some more information in this documentation below on our plan options:

Apps Framework

Plans and pricing

After creating your app, you must define the number of plans you want to offer, the difference between each tier, the pricing model they follow, and the price of each tier. Check out our pricing report for a deeper look into selecting plan types,...

Cheers,
Bill
